title: Peucedanum dissolutum
taxonomy: Peucedanum dissolutum is classified within the family Apiaceae, commonly known as the carrot or parsley family. It belongs to the genus Peucedanum, which comprises about 30 species of flowering plants. The species Peucedanum dissolutum is further categorized as a flowering plant within the class Magnoliopsida, also known as dicotyledons. Peucedanum dissolutum is native to the mountainous regions of China, where it grows as a perennial herb. The full classification of Peucedanum dissolutum is Peucedanum dissolutum, family Apiaceae, genus Peucedanum, class Magnoliopsida, order Apiales, and division Magnoliophyta.
